group_label: luminal epithelial cell of mammary gland
group_name: LUMINAL EPITHELIAL CELL OF MAMMARY GLAND
feature_label: luminal epithelial cell of mammary gland
feature_name: LUMINAL EPITHELIAL CELL OF MAMMARY GLAND
source_rationale: For the left and right mammary gland, two CTs that cannot be mapped to a high-level CT make up ∼70% of the CTs across ASs. As a result, the stacked bar graphs for these are mostly grey: luminal epithelial cell of mammary gland (purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CL_0002326) with ∼53% and fibroblast of breast (purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CL_4006000) with ∼16%.
